understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game was to maneuver the selectable pieces to reach specific goal locations on the grid, likely by navigating them into the '+' goal cells shown in the semantic_grid.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement operated on a fixed grid with each move shifting a piece by one cell (3 pixels). Some pieces could be selected by clicking on their positions, allowing the player to control different pieces. Blocked movement occurred when a wall or other obstacle existed in the chosen direction; pushable blocks could sometimes allow for pushing, but some borders or objects acted as impassable walls. Attempting to move into a wall or obstacle did not change the position. The player could swap control between selectables with the CLICK action using pixel coordinates.
